channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meta lance Facebook Verified, une fonction pour certifier que vous êtes bien réel
item.description: Meta vient de dévoiler son nouveau système de vérification de profil. Facebook Verified doit vous permettre de montrer aux autres utilisateurs que vous êtes bien qui vous prétendez être.

item.title: Fin des jeux physiques : le patron d’Ubisoft donne raison à Sony
item.description: Depuis le début du mois et l'annonce de la fin de production des disques physiques par Sony, la communauté des joueurs est vent debout. Or, selon Yves Guillemot, PDG d'Ubisoft, cette fin du support physique ne devrait rien changer au marché, au contraire.

item.title: Experts warn ChatGPT's Workspace Agent Builder can be hijacked to create malicious AI workers
item.description: A single phishing link could have spelled disaster, thanks to a flaw in ChatGPT's Agent Builder.

item.title: Plus fort que prévu : ce nouveau SUV électrique Volvo surprend avec une autonomie de plus de 800 km
item.description: Le nouveau Volvo EX60 s’illustre par son rayon d’action exceptionnel pouvant dépasser les 800 km. Normalement homologuée à 518 km d’autonomie, sa surpuissante version P10 est même encore meilleure que prévue aux yeux de l’EPA américaine.

item.title: Whack-a-drone
item.description: In Pasadena, California, there's a cute red brick courtyard where one storefront isn't like the rest. The glass doors open onto a sparse industrial hallway, which leads to a sunlit foyer with a large spiral staircase. Go up, and you'll see a typical coworking space: open tables, healthy snacks, a collection of meeting rooms with […]

item.title: Meta launches a storefront platform through Facebook Marketplace
item.description: Facebook has introduced an app called Seller that effectively professionalizes Facebook Marketplace.

item.title: Une Apple Watch en titane pour moins de 500 €, c’est possible grâce à cette offre Boulanger
item.description: L'Apple Watch Series 10 en titane 46 mm a beau être sortie en 2024, elle reste l'une des meilleures montres de l'écosystème Apple, même depuis l'arrivée de la Series 11. Aujourd'hui, elle est disponible chez Boulanger au prix de 499 euros au lieu de 849 euros à sa sortie.

item.title: Vie privée des mineurs | L’UE accuse TikTok d’enfreindre sa réglementation
item.description: La Commission européenne accuse TikTok de ne pas avoir suffisamment protégé les droits à la vie privée des enfants sur sa plateforme en permettant à des adultes de consulter les comptes de mineurs.

item.title: Meta launches new Facebook Verified badge for actual, real humans
item.description: Meta is trying to tackle scammers that are using generative AI by introducing a new kind of verification using user selfies.

item.title: TikTok’s protection of minors should not be opt-in, warns EU
item.description: TikTok has attracted the ire of the European Union over its protection of children who use the video sharing platform. The European Commission announced preliminary findings today under the Digital Services Act (DSA) that offer specific issues to address. The Commission suggests that TikTok should adjust the default settings of minors' "public" accounts so the […]...

item.title: Best Window Air Conditioners of 2026: Midea, Zafro, GE
item.description: These are the AC units we’ve trusted to cool our homes for months, if not years.

item.title: Grosse panne PlayStation Network : des milliers de joueurs touchés, que se passe-t-il ?
item.description: Un grand nombre d'utilisateurs constatent des problèmes de connexion sur le réseau en ligne de Sony, le PlayStation Network (PSN). Le constructeur, de son côté, n'indique pour l'instant aucun dysfonctionnement.

item.title: More than 200 companies sign Trump's 'pledge' to protect consumers from data center price rises
item.description: The Trump administration says more than 200 firms have signed onto its non-binding Ratepayer Protection Pledge.

item.title: Marvel's Wolverine just got a new story trailer spotlighting Jean Grey, The Hand, and... is that Troy Baker?
item.description: Insomniac Games has revealed brand new story details for Marvel's Wolverine alongside an official story trailer.

item.title: LG promises to stop McAfee spam ads following pressure from Microsoft
item.description: Following user outcry and pressure from Microsoft, LG has agreed to stop showing McAfee pop-up spam downloaded from its monitors.

item.title: National Tequila Day freebies and deals: Here’s where to get your after-work margaritas, from Chili’s to Chuy’s
item.description: The Mexican distilled beverage has proved so popular over the years that it inspired a hit song and its own holiday. Don’t let it go to waste. Theme songs not only quickly establish the mood and tone of your favorite movies and TV shows but also reveal clues about settings. If National Tequila Day had an official theme song, “Tequila” by the Champs would be an excellent choice....

item.title: Ce chargeur sans fil Samsung, qui recharge trois appareils simultanément, est à 15 € au lieu de 99
item.description: Si vous souhaitez gagner un temps précieux au moment de recharger votre smartphone, vos écouteurs sans fil et votre montre connectée, vous pouvez par exemple opter pour un chargeur sans fil à trois emplacements, comme celui que propose Samsung. Un modèle affiché à 15 euros au lieu de 99,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: BenQ TK705STi 4K Projector Review: A Midrange Pick for Gamers
item.description: The TK705STi’s highly responsive, low-latency performance makes gameplay ultra-realistic. For movies and TV? It’s a purely average home projector.

item.title: Guerre en Ukraine : la Russie brouille les drones, ces entreprises cherchent une parade
item.description: La Russie perfectionne ses techniques pour brouiller les systèmes GPS des drones ukrainiens. Lors du Salon international de l’aéronautique de Farnborough, plusieurs entreprises ont dévoilé des solutions permettant aux drones de continuer à fonctionner malgré ces perturbations.

item.title: What Is Entropy, Really?
item.description: Never mind the “heat death of the universe.” Entropy is just a bridge between two levels of reality.

item.title: Facebook considers giving up and becoming TikTok
item.description: Facebook is planning some big changes to try and keep its users from jumping to rival social platforms like TikTok - changes that sound dubiously similar to becoming a TikTok clone. Facebook head Tom Alison announced today that the platform will begin testing a "reimagined experience" later this year that will put a subset of […]

item.title: How to watch Hungarian Grand Prix 2026 F1: live stream from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Hungarian Grand Prix 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, and potentially for free.

item.title: If open weight models are the future, U.S. AI companies are going to have a hard time
item.description: OpenAI, Anthropic, and other Western labs have spent billions training the model weights at the heart of their most advanced systems. Top executives at leading Western AI companies are increasingly warning about the safety and national security risks posed by Chinese open-weight frontier models. What they tend not to mention is that these models are improving rapidly and, because they are freely available, pose a serious threat to Western labs’ business models....

item.title: Incident chez OpenAI | Un signal d’alarme pour la souveraineté des données
item.description: Un système dernier cri d’intelligence artificielle (IA) qui dépasse les bornes, ce n’est pas nouveau. Le fait que des leaders mondiaux de la technologie ne parviennent pas à contrôler leurs systèmes d’IA rend plus essentielles aux yeux des experts la souveraineté numérique et la protection des données et des systèmes publics et privés du Québec et du Canada....

item.title: The regulatory unlock that's reshaping AI infrastructure
item.description: Strict regulations are forcing a massive shift from traditional clouds to sovereign, localized networks.

item.title: Square Enix just dropped Final Fantasy 10 and 10-2 for Nintendo Switch 2 with some key upgrades — but there's bad news for existing Switch version owners
item.description: Final Fantasy 10 and 10-2 just dropped on Nintendo Switch 2.

item.title: No NordVPN plan? Its new free HangUp app still screens your scam calls on Android
item.description: NordVPN has launched HangUp, a free standalone Android app that identifies, categorizes, and blocks scam and telemarketing calls for users with just a free Nord account.

item.title: Renault devient n°2 de l’électrique en Europe : le coup de maître de la R5 E-Tech
item.description: Avec des ventes en hausse de 63 % au premier semestre 2026, les voitures électriques cartonnent chez Renault. Un succès notamment porté par la R5 E-Tech, qui domine toujours son segment.

item.title: AI value is stalling but the issue isn’t the technology
item.description: The biggest barrier to AI value isn't technology. It's leadership, culture and workforce confidence.

item.title: “Trusted human curation is becoming increasingly valuable”: This new Squarespace marketplace wants to fix broken search
item.description: Could curation be a better approach to discovering the tools, templates, and services you need?

item.title: The Rings of Power season 3 trailer launch live — all of the latest news and rumors on the next teaser for Amazon's The Lords of the Rings TV show
item.description: The Rings of Power season 3's first trailer will be released later today — join TechRadar as we count down to its grand reveal.

item.title: Some of Our Favorite Brain-Boosting Toys for Kids of All Ages
item.description: From musical instruments and games to play pieces that encourage balance and dexterity, these toys will engage your child’s mind and body.

item.title: The ignored, ugly utilities that run your home just got a major redesign
item.description: HVAC units and water heaters are going high design, with a dash of AI thrown in. Could you love your furnace? Would you put your water heater on display? Is your air conditioner a reflection of your personal design aesthetic?

item.title: The manicure is a $25 billion habit Katia Beauchamp wants you to quit
item.description: Her new brand, Buff Beauty, makes the case that the healthiest, best-looking nail is a bare one—and that the salon was always optional. It’s 4 p.m. on a Sunday. You’re at the nail salon because you have a meeting Monday morning that requires you to look polished and put-together. In theory, this is supposed to be a relaxing part of your weekend. But in practice, you’re thinking about how this is eating into time you’d spend grocery shopping and prepping your kid’s lunch for tomorrow. To add insult to injury, when you finally pay, the mani-pedi comes to more than $100 with tip....

item.title: Move over, James Gunn: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe will have DC crossover episode — and there's one iconic superhero HBO Max would be stupid not to include
item.description: San Diego Comic Con has confirmed an epic crossover between DC and Stuart Fails to Save the Universe — but one superhero is needed to bring Big Bang Theory's lore full circle.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra : jusqu’à 700 € de remise chez Boulanger avant même sa sortie
item.description: Un smartphone pliant à 2 199 euros qui passe à 1 499 euros avant même d'être disponible, ça ne se voit pas tous les jours. Le Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, tout juste annoncé et attendu le 7 août prochain, profite déjà d'une réduction cumulée de 700 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: The case for moving creative production AI to the edge
item.description: As creative AI scales, local deployment can give enterprises more control and flexibility.

item.title: Be careful where you click — ChatGPT joins Microsoft, Google in most-impersonated brands online
item.description: OpenAI debuts in the top 10 most impersonated companies, seeing nearly as many attacks as PayPal, WhatsApp, Facebook.

item.title: Réseaux sociaux interdits aux moins de 15 ans : l’exemple australien n’augure rien de bon
item.description: La France interdit les réseaux sociaux aux moins de 15 ans dès septembre 2026. L'Australie a tenté le coup depuis l'an dernier, et les premiers résultats ne font pas rêver.
